objective:

Path('governance/audit/claude').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

findings = [
  {'id':'CA-CRIT-001','severity':'critical','title':'Objects are JSON records, not executable agents','response':'accepted','bem':'BEM-909/BEM-910'},
  {'id':'CA-CRIT-002','severity':'critical','title':'commit_sha null / independent proof weakness','response':'accepted','bem':'BEM-912'},
  {'id':'CA-CRIT-003','severity':'critical','title':'Managed channel has no consumer','response':'accepted','bem':'BEM-909'},
  {'id':'CA-HIGH-001','severity':'high','title':'GPT executed and validated same artifacts','response':'accepted','bem':'BEM-912'},
  {'id':'CA-HIGH-002','severity':'high','title':'task_registry owner mismatch P1-DIR-RULE-001','response':'accepted','bem':'BEM-908'},
  {'id':'CA-HIGH-003','severity':'high','title':'dispatch queue has queued DSP-BEM-896-001','response':'accepted','bem':'BEM-908'},
  {'id':'CA-HIGH-004','severity':'high','title':'missing canonical architecture plan/fact/gap file','response':'accepted','bem':'BEM-911'},
  {'id':'CA-MED-001','severity':'medium','title':'pilot scaffold uses placeholders','response':'accepted_with_gate','bem':'BEM-905 operator gate'},
  {'id':'CA-MED-002','severity':'medium','title':'event log too small/not complete','response':'accepted','bem':'BEM-911'},
  {'id':'CA-MED-003','severity':'medium','title':'autonomy log rotation strategy unclear','response':'accepted','bem':'BEM-911'},
  {'id':'CA-MED-004','severity':'medium','title':'no GD/DIR prompts','response':'accepted','bem':'BEM-910'}
]
backlog = {'status':'active','source':'Claude external audit after BEM-906','items':findings}
Path('governance/backlog/BEM907_CLAUDE_AUDIT_REMEDIATION_BACKLOG.json').write_text(json.dumps(backlog, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
md = '# BEM-907 Claude audit remediation backlog\n\nStatus: active\n\nAll critical/high findings are accepted and converted to remediation work.\n\n'
for f in findings:
    md += '| ' + f['id'] + ' | ' + f['severity'] + ' | ' + f['title'] + ' | ' + f['response'] + ' | ' + f['bem'] + ' |\n'
Path('governance/audit/claude/BEM907_CLAUDE_AUDIT_REMEDIATION_BACKLOG.md').write_text(md, encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/reports/BEM907_CLAUDE_AUDIT_RESPONSE.md').write_text('# BEM-907 Claude audit response\n\nStatus: REMEDIATION_STARTED\n\nVerdict accepted: CONDITIONAL PASS.\n\nThe remediation will continue without operator until a genuine gate is reached.\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM907_CLAUDE_AUDIT_BACKLOG_READY.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-907 Claude audit backlog proof\nStatus: READY\nFindings accepted: ' + str(len(findings)) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/backlog/BEM907_CLAUDE_AUDIT_REMEDIATION_BACKLOG.json','governance/audit/claude/BEM907_CLAUDE_AUDIT_REMEDIATION_BACKLOG.md','governance/reports/BEM907_CLAUDE_AUDIT_RESPONSE.md',str(marker)])
ops_applied.append('BEM907 Claude audit remediation backlog ready')
